title: arnica alpina subsp. attenuata
intro: Arnica alpina subsp. attenuata, also known as mountain arnica, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may help to reduce pain and swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Arnica alpina subsp. attenuata are numerous, including its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce bruising and swelling, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Arnica alpina subsp. attenuata can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tinctures, salves, and creams, which can be applied topically to reap its benefits.
